roles.name: Planner
roles.description: Turns a backlog item into ordered, verifiable stories for the run.

roles.name: Setup
roles.description: Captures repo path, baseline, and execution commands.

roles.name: Developer
roles.description: Implements one story at a time and records changed files plus tests.

roles.name: Verifier
roles.description: Checks that the run is complete enough to proceed.

roles.name: Tester
roles.description: Runs broader integration or end-to-end validation when needed.

roles.name: Reviewer
roles.description: Reviews the completed change set and requests follow-up if needed.
